nasb.text: Then Barak said to her, “If you will go with me, then I will go; but if you will not go with me, I will not go.”

esv.text: Barak said to her, “If you will go with me, I will go, but if you will not go with me, I will not go.”

cnv.text: 巴拉對她說：“如果你與我同去，我就去；如果你不與我同去，我就不去。”

ccb.text: 巴拉回答说：“你跟我去，我就去；你不跟我去，我就不去。”
